description: Phase 227 founder-feedback rebaseline cases for current large-context, chunked-investigation, advisory, deferred, rejected, and repair-worthy feedback classification.

cases.seed_prompt: In /mnt/c/agentic_agents/runtime-state/phase214/generated-large-corpus, trace the end-to-end cross-file flow across the whole corpus from risk gate to audit summary. Read only.
cases.feedback_template: Record feedback for run {run_id}: missing: this current chunked investigation response should become a baseline prompt because future answers must keep scope limits, evidence metadata, and unverified-edge caveats. useful: the response stayed read only.

cases.seed_prompt: In /mnt/c/agentic_agents/runtime-state/phase214/generated-large-corpus, produce a long evidence report with all relevant top files for the order replay pipeline. Read only.
cases.feedback_template: Record feedback for run {run_id}: missing: add this as a holdout prompt so future large-context repairs do not overfit the chunked investigation prompt. useful: the answer included evidence and stayed read only.

cases.seed_prompt: In /mnt/c/coinbase_testing_repo_frozen_tmp, diagnose this issue: a tester says the stealth lookup answer missed the likely root cause. Read only.
cases.feedback_template: Record feedback for run {run_id}: wrong: the answer missed the likely root cause and needs a repair follow-up before this prompt family can be trusted.

cases.seed_prompt: In /mnt/c/coinbase_testing_repo_frozen_tmp.github, explain what find_stealth_order_by_placed_order_id does in core/stealth_order_manager.py. Read only. Include key inputs, outputs, side effects, and tests.
cases.feedback_template: Record feedback for run {run_id}: useful: the answer was clear, chat-visible, and does not need a new baseline or repair.

cases.seed_prompt: In /mnt/c/agentic_agents/runtime-state/phase214/generated-large-corpus, summarize generated service architecture without reading every file. Read only.
cases.feedback_template: Record feedback for run {run_id}: useful: the answer was acceptable. notes: advisory only, monitor whether future answers make the evidence table easier to skim; this is nonblocking.

cases.seed_prompt: In /mnt/c/coinbase_testing_repo_frozen_tmp.github, review core/stealth_order_manager.py for duplicated placed_order_id lookup risks. Read only.
cases.feedback_template: Record feedback for run {run_id}: useful: the answer correctly stayed read only. notes: advanced refactor remains deferred to a future phase and is not in current scope.
